allow: PowerShell($gameList = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\jayoo\\AppData\\Roaming\\ludusavi\\ludusavi-game-list.json" | ConvertFrom-Json; $mewgenicsEntry = $gameList.games."Mewgenics"; if \($mewgenicsEntry\) { $path = $mewgenicsEntry.path_by_device.PSObject.Properties | Select-Object -First 1 | ForEach-Object { $_.Value }; Write-Host "Mewgenics save path from game-list: $path"; if \($path -and \(Test-Path $path\)\) { Get-ChildItem -Recurse -File $path | Sort-Object LastWriteTimeUtc -Descending | Select-Object -First 3 | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "$\($_.LastWriteTimeUtc\) [$\([Math]::Floor\(\(\($_.LastWriteTimeUtc - \(Get-Date '1970-01-01'\)\).TotalSeconds\)\)\)] $\($_.FullName\)" } } else { Write-Host "Path does not exist or empty" } } else { Write-Host "No Mewgenics in game-list. Checking sync-games.json..."; Get-Content "C:\\Users\\jayoo\\AppData\\Roaming\\ludusavi\\sync-games.json" })

Bash(awk 'BEGIN{prev=""} {if \(prev ~ /^ &ToggledRegistry::default\\\(\\\),$/ && $0 ~ /^ &Default::default\\\(\\\),$/\) {print prev; print " None,"; prev=$0; next}; if \(prev != ""\) print prev; prev=$0} END{if \(prev != ""\) print prev}' src/scan.rs)

Bash(awk 'BEGIN{prev=""; remove_count=0} {if \(remove_count > 0\) {remove_count--; next}; if \($0 ~ /^                        &\\[\\],$/ && prev ~ /^                        &BackupId::Latest,$/\) {remove_count=1; print prev; prev=$0; next}; if \(prev ~ /^                    layout\\.scan_for_restoration\\\($/\) {} ; if \(prev != ""\) print prev; prev=$0} END{if \(prev != ""\) print prev}' src/scan/layout.rs)

Bash(awk 'BEGIN{depth=0; in_test=0; buffer=""} /^    #\\[test\\]$/ {if \(in_test\) {if \(buffer !~ /BackupFilter/\) printf "%s", buffer}; in_test=1; buffer=""; depth=0} in_test==1 {buffer = buffer $0 "\\n"; for\(i=1;i<=length\($0\);i++\) {c=substr\($0,i,1\); if \(c=="{"\) depth++; if \(c=="}"\) depth--}; if \(depth==0 && /^    \\}$/\) {if \(buffer !~ /BackupFilter/\) printf "%s", buffer; in_test=0; buffer=""}} in_test==0 {print}' src/scan.rs)
